sections.heading: Deep Dive: Prefixes & Suffixes
sections.body: Let's go deeper into Prefixes & Suffixes. This section covers the internals and advanced concepts that separate beginners from proficient developers.

sections.heading: Common Patterns & Best Practices
sections.body:
Here are the best practices for Prefixes & Suffixes:

1. Start Simple: Begin with the simplest implementation that works, then add complexity as needed.

2. Follow Conventions: Stick to established patterns and conventions in your codebase. Consistency makes code maintainable.

3. Test Your Work: Always test your implementation. Write tests that cover both happy paths and edge cases.

4. Document Decisions: Add comments that explain WHY, not WHAT. Future you (and teammates) will thank you.

5. Review and Refactor: Code reviews and regular refactoring keep code quality high.

sections.heading: Practice Task
sections.body: Apply what you've learned about Prefixes & Suffixes. Try building a small project that uses these concepts. Start with the basics and gradually add features.

summary: Prefixes & Suffixes is an essential concept that you'll use throughout your development journey. un-, re-, pre-, -ly, -tion, -ment and word building. Practice the examples in this lesson and apply them to your own projects.
